name: one-person-billionaire
description: A library of 5 installable plugins for solo agent operators: the One Person Billionaire curriculum + the GTM, SDR, DevRel, and Product Ops harnesses. Install the bundle or pick the plugins you need.

plugins.name: opb-curriculum
plugins.description: The original 22-lesson One Person Billionaire curriculum: 27 core skills + a 40-skill GTM analytics pack + 7 chained slash commands + 4 templates. Hormozi's $100M Offers + GTM/distribution/monetization for solo operators chasing $5M-$50M ARR.

plugins.name: gtm-ops
plugins.description: GTM operating system for AI-first sales orgs. 11 cf-* skills running the 3-loop model (Acquisition · Nurture · Re-engagement) on Salesforce + n8n + Claude. Includes agents, SQL, dashboards, evals, and the full operating spec.

plugins.name: ai-sdr
plugins.description: Autonomous AI SDR running inside Claude Code. Router + 7 modes (research, validate, outreach, follow-up, batch, analytics). Score-gated pipelines, TSV staging, three-tier fallback, hardcoded NEVER/ALWAYS rails. Replaces a 25-node n8n workflow.

plugins.name: devrel-playbook
plugins.description: 27 community-building skills + applied case studies + a synthetic developer ICP dataset. Super-fans, ambassador programs, decentralized communities, certification, IKEA effect, creator flywheel, champions, dogfooding, master end-to-end growth playbook.

plugins.name: product-ops
plugins.description: Lightweight product operations SOP for small teams (1-2 PMs, 3-4 devs). Six-stage execution lifecycle (Discovery → Definition → Design → Build → Release → Learn) with templates, gates, and weekly cadence.
